retrieved_article_snippets.title: Article 14
retrieved_article_snippets.snippet: The minimum glass floor area providing natural lighting of rooms in a dwelling must be: 1° 10% of the area served by the following rooms: living room, dining room, living room and sleeping space combined with another space; 2° 5% of the area served by rooms and other rooms not mentioned above; 3°...

retrieved_article_snippets.title: Article 27.1
retrieved_article_snippets.snippet: The roof structure of a building with a height of more than 3 floors and a height of more than 250 m2 shall, when the roof slope is less than 2 units vertically in 12 units horizontally (2:12) or 16.7%, be designed to receive a type 1 green roof in addition to the loads prescribed by the Code.
